caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of "Rural Community Food System," specifically focusing on "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost/Price." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a webpage with a detailed diagram on the right side, which illustrates various interconnected elements and relationships within the food system. The text on the left explains that retailers who are willing to source locally can increase the availability and supply of locally sourced products, potentially lowering product costs and increasing local consumption. This, in turn, supports those retailers. The diagram includes a legend explaining different colored lines and nodes, indicating various interactions such as "Adds to/Same," "Subtracts from/Opposite," and "Border Implies Leverage." The overall focus is on understanding the dynamics and benefits of local sourcing within a rural community food system.
